name: Parallel-Session Admission-Control Aggregation (admission-layer only)
details: SCOPE: session-creation admission control only (NOT spend-time enforcement); opened 5/5 parallel sessions under same (userId, agentName); per-session cap $0.50; admission-cumulative authorized $2.5; per-session ceiling $10000.; FINDING: admission control does NOT aggregate caps across parallel sessions. Spend-time enforcement requires separate test with delegated-signing enabled.

request_sent.operation: CreatePaymentSession x N (parallel) + cap-value boundaries — admission-control test only
request_sent.audit_note_2026_05_26: Scope narrowed: this measures ADMISSION CONTROL (whether N sessions can be created), NOT spend-time enforcement (whether cumulative spend exceeding session caps is blocked). Spend-time test requires Coinbase delegated signing enabled in CDP project policies — see ACP-004 corrective probing.

boundary_results.0: REJECTED: An error occurred (ValidationException) when calling the CreatePaymentSession operation: MaxSpendAmount value must be positive
boundary_results.-1.00: REJECTED: An error occurred (ValidationException) when calling the CreatePaymentSession operation: MaxSpendAmount value must be positive
boundary_results.10000.01: REJECTED: An error occurred (ValidationException) when calling the CreatePaymentSession operation: MaxSpendAmount value must not exceed 10000. Received: 10000.01

csg_mapping: HC-1: Admission-control aggregation needed for principal-bound spend governance
